ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "qname" TEXT /* Qualified name of the dataset */,
  "namespace" TEXT /* Namespace of the dataset */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., pathway, reaction) */,
  "fixed" TEXT /* Fixed value of the dataset (if applicable) */,
  "default_val" TEXT /* Default value of the dataset (if applicable) */,
  "use" TEXT /* Usage of the dataset (e.g., annotation, diagram) */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation of the dataset (e.g., stoichiometry of participants) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the dataset */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last user who updated the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_namespace FOREIGN KEY ("namespace") REFERENCES namespaces ("namespace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "namespaces" (
  "namespace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each namespace */,
  "namespace_uri" TEXT /* Uniform Resource Identifier (URI) of the namespace */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the namespace was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the namespace */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the namespace */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last user who updated the namespace */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("namespace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the annotation belongs to */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the annotation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the annotation */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last user who updated the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagrams" (
  "diagram_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagram */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the diagram belongs to */,
  "diagram_data" TEXT /* Diagram data (e.g., SVG, PNG) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the diagram */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the diagram was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the diagram */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the diagram */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last user who updated the diagram */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagram_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagrams_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagram_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element */,
  "diagram_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagram the element belongs to */,
  "element_type" TEXT /* Type of the element (e.g., node, edge) */,
  "element_data" TEXT /* Element data (e.g., node position, edge label) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the element was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the element */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the element */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last user who updated the element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagram_elements_diagram_id FOREIGN KEY ("diagram_id") REFERENCES diagrams ("diagram_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stoichiometries" (
  "stoichiometry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stoichiometry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the stoichiometry belongs to */,
  "stoichiometry_type" TEXT /* Type of stoichiometry (e.g., mif:stoichiometryType) */,
  "stoichiometry_data" TEXT /* Stoichiometry data (e.g., reactant, product) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the stoichiometry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the stoichiometry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stoichiometry */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the stoichiometry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last user who updated the stoichiometry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stoichiometry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stoichiometries_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reactions" (
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the reaction belongs to */,
  "reaction_name" TEXT /* Name of the reaction */,
  "reaction_data" TEXT /* Reaction data (e.g., reactants, products) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the reaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the reaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the reaction */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last user who updated the reaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reactions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reaction the participant belongs to */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "participant_data" TEXT /* Participant data (e.g., structure, function) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the participant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the participant */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the participant */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last user who updated the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_reaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("reaction_id") REFERENCES reactions ("reaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last user who updated the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
